roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL CLARIFICATION RE ADMISSION OF PROBATION VIOLATION & CASE 20006036/CTRD:ADMISSION OF PROBATION VIOLATION AND PROBATION MODIFICATION  SENTENCE IMPOSED ON 10-07-20 IS SET ASIDE AND VACATED,  DEFENDANT WAS NOT ON PROBATIONIN THIS CASE,  DA FILED THE MOTION TO REVOKE UNDER THE INCORRECT CASE NUMBER,  DA TO FILE THE MTR UNDER CASE 20006036/VD:12-22-20 APD RESTITUTION REPORT/
